title: Reflecting on a year of Claude Code
summary: Claude Code is an agentic terminal-based coding tool developed by Anthropic that reached its one-year general availability milestone. The discussion covers verification practices, auto mode, adoption across non-engineering roles, routine automation, and scaling considerations for multi-agent workflows.
